shared_attributes.movement: scroll left (ground at Current_Speed, clouds at Current_Speed * 0.5)

context.role: Optional background element for parallax depth effect
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=10-40px (random), scrolls left at Current_Speed * 0.5
context.usage_scenario: Optional decorative element spawned randomly (30% probability every 5-10 seconds), provides parallax scrolling effect at half ground speed, maximum 3 clouds on screen

visual_specification.shape: Simple rounded cloud silhouette, large size (2x cloud_small)
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art, simple outline, minimal detail

animation.description: No sprite animation. Movement is position-based scrolling at Current_Speed * 0.5 (parallax effect). Despawns when x < -100

visual_specification.details: Minimalist cloud shape in primary color, larger than cloud_small, low visual priority, blends into background

relationships.shared_with: Same color and scrolling behavior (0.5x speed) as cloud_small
relationships.differences_from: cloud_small is 46x14px (half size). Both are optional and non-collidable. Large cloud is less common in spawn probability

explicit_negations: No transparency except full alpha channel
No high contrast that distracts from foreground
